{{CargoRelic
|name=Otis Elevator
|class_id=22109
|rank=AA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.12%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On July 5, 1853 AD, Otis demonstrated his elevator safety system at the Crystal Palace Convention in New York City.<br>Otis, an American inventor, developed the passenger lift. Unlike old-fashioned elevators, it includes a brake that stops the platform from falling even if the suspension rope breaks. This design solved a significant safety issue of elevators, making them widely used around the world. The Otis Elevator Company he founded remains a leading company in the industry.
|fame=66
|art=41
|fth=34
|civ=43
|tech=44
|ss1=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +80<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +8
|ss2=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12
|ss3=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +16
|ss4=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +240<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +24
|ss5=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +32
|ss7=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +32<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +60
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Zombie Cells gained +7.5%
}}
